candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line exists, but it appears below gross profit alongside operating expenses rather than within Cost of Revenues/Cost of sales. No row explicitly ties this D&A to COGS/COR, so adding it to the selected COGS bucket would risk misclassification.
Component of the standalone D&A section, not specifically labelled as COGS-related. Also subsumed by the summary row 'Depreciation and amortisation'.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly tied to R&D, not COGS.
A component-style amortization row with zero values and no COGS linkage; also would be covered by any D&A summary if relevant.
Balancing row within the D&A block, not a standalone COGS D&A amount to add separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS rows are 'Cost of Revenues' and 'Cost of sales'. The visible D&A rows sit below gross profit as separate operating-expense lines, not as COGS subcomponents or same-bucket labels such as 'in COGS' or 'in COR'. Conservative treatment is to not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A summary line appears at the same level as other operating expense rows and outside the selected XSGA component rows. Because it is separate from Sales and marketing, Administrative, and the R&D expense row, it should be added separately if XSGA is being constructed from those selected rows only. It is also the summary row over the more granular D&A component rows, so it is preferred to avoid double counting.
Component of the standalone D&A block; do not use when the summary row 'Depreciation and amortisation' is present.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is a D&A component explicitly in R&D, but it rolls into the summary 'Depreciation and amortisation'. Per summary-vs-components rule, prefer the summary row only.
Granular component row with zero values and covered by the summary D&A line if relevant.
Balancing line within the D&A block, not an expense row to add separately.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA bucket consists of separate functional operating expense rows and does not include this standalone D&A line. The statement shows an explicit D&A summary row before operating profit, so D&A is not assumed embedded in the selected XSGA rows. Although an R&D-specific amortization component is disclosed, the summary row closely matches the sum of components and should be chosen alone to avoid double counting.
